diagrams.title: PUE Formula and Interpretation
diagrams.description: Shows how PUE is calculated and what different values mean
elements: Total Facility Energy (all energy entering data center)
IT Equipment Energy (energy used by servers, storage, networking)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to measure and interpret data center energy efficiency

diagrams.title: CPU Power States (C-states)
diagrams.description: Illustrates different CPU idle states from fully active to deep sleep
elements: Wake-up latency increases with higher C-states
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how CPUs save power during idle periods

diagrams.title: Virtualization Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how multiple virtual machines run on a single physical server
elements: Shared Resources: CPU, RAM, Storage, Network
diagrams.purpose: Understand how virtualization reduces physical hardware and energy consumption

diagrams.title: Data Center Energy Flow
diagrams.description: Shows energy distribution and major consumption points in a data center
diagrams.purpose: Identify where energy is consumed and lost in data center operations
